title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says US Nearing Deal With Iran
summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following two days of US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

title: Asian Stocks to Gain as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks in Asia were set to advance Friday, tracking a rally on Wall Street after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran, raising hopes for a diplomatic end to a conflict that has rattled global markets.

title: Blackstone Said to Be in Talks to Buy Canada Property Firm H&R REIT
summary: Blackstone Inc. is in discussions with Canada’s H&R Real Estate Investment Trust about a potential acquisition, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
